headline: VST Stock: Valuation and Other Factors That Could Move Shares
summary: Vistra trades below peers despite stronger earnings visibility, with hedging and contracts shaping valuation as investors weigh 2026 guidance and long-term growth.

headline: Vistra Banks on the Data Center & ERCOT Growth: The 2027-2028 Setup
summary: VST bets on data center demand and ERCOT growth, with hedging and long-term nuclear deals shaping a potential pricing inflection by 2027-2028.

headline: Assessing Dominion Energy (D) Valuation As Shares Rebound And Analysts See Modest Upside
summary: Why Dominion Energy (D) Is On Investors’ Radar Dominion Energy (D) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at $61.84 and posting a 1.6% gain over the past day and 3.4% over the past week. See our latest analysis for Dominion Energy. That daily gain builds on a 7-day share price return of 3.4%, although the 30-day share price return of 2.1% contrasts with a 4.7% gain over 90 days and a 1-year total shareholder return of 15.4%. This suggests momentum has been...
